global_context.scene_description: A photorealistic interior shot of an HVAC contractor's office or job-board area, showing a paper wall calendar pinned to a corkboard. The calendar is the focal point, dominating the center-right of the frame. Multiple weeks of dates are visible. Most of the date squares have a red rubber-stamp impression that reads BOOKED in bold all-caps red ink, applied at slight angles, some overlapping the date numbers. A few date squares remain unstamped. A man's hand holding a black ballpoint pen is visible from the right side of the frame, hovering over the calendar as if about to mark another date. Behind the corkboard, a slightly out-of-focus contractor's workspace is visible with a phone, a clipboard, and a coffee mug. Lighting is warm fluorescent overhead, casting realistic indoor shadows. The top 18% of the frame is reserved for headline overlay. The bottom 14% of the frame is reserved for a red CTA banner overlay. Mood: scarcity, busy, urgency.

lighting.source: overhead fluorescent + warm window light from left

composition.camera_angle: slight downward angle, looking at the calendar like a person standing in front of it
composition.depth_of_field: calendar in sharp focus, background workspace softly blurred
composition.focal_point: the BOOKED stamps clustered across the calendar dates
composition.notes: top 18% reserved for headline overlay, bottom 14% reserved for red CTA banner overlay

objects.label: paper wall calendar pinned to corkboard
objects.location: center to right of frame, dominates 60% of the visible area

visual_attributes.color: off-white paper with black grid lines and date numbers

micro_details: red rubber-stamp BOOKED ink applied at slight angles across most date squares
some stamps slightly smudged or partial
two or three date squares left unstamped, suggesting near-full booking

objects.label: man's hand holding a pen
objects.location: entering from right edge of frame

visual_attributes.material: weathered working hands, holding a black ballpoint pen

objects.pose_or_orientation: hovering above the calendar as if about to write or stamp
micro_details: slight tan line on the wrist suggesting outdoor work
pen tip pointed downward at an unstamped date

objects.label: blurred workspace background
micro_details: a coffee mug, a clipboard, a phone receiver — softly out of focus

semantic_relationships: the BOOKED stamps create a visual rhythm of scarcity / fullness across the calendar grid
the hand entering frame implies someone is actively trying to schedule but running out of room
the blurred workspace establishes that this is a real contractor's office, not a stock-photo prop
